pages.title: Mini Golf Battle
pages.description:
Compete against opponents by putting golf balls through intricate miniature courses using precise aim and power control. Players navigate varied obstacle layouts requiring skillful timing and shot placement to sink holes within a limited number of strokes. The game features head-to-head duels on compact green settings that demand quick thinking and adaptable shot strategy.

Key Features

• Shot power and angle control  
• Multiplayer turn-based dueling  
• Progressive course obstacle complexity  
• Time-limited stroke challenges  
• Miniature golf course environments

pages.title: Golf Mini
pages.description:
Putt precise shots using quick aiming and timing controls in this casual golf challenge. Players navigate compact courses with simplified swing mechanics to sink balls into holes under stroke limits. Levels steadily increase in difficulty by integrating varied hole layouts and subtle wind effects, encouraging skillful shot adjustments and strategic pacing.

Key Features

• Timing-based swing system  
• Aiming controls with power meter  
• Increasing hole complexity  
• Stroke limit scoring  
• Miniature course environments

pages.title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
pages.description:
Arrange cards into golf-themed sequences by selecting matching ranks and suits to clear the tableau. The game uses solitaire mechanics mixed with golf scoring elements to challenge players aiming for the lowest card count on the board. Progression unfolds through varied card layouts mimicking golf holes, offering a strategic twist on classic solitaire aimed at casual players.

Key Features

• Card matching solitaire mechanics  
• Click and drag card controls  
• Progressive golf hole layouts  
• Score tracking with golf rules  
• Minimalist golf-themed visuals

pages.title: Golf Orbit
pages.description:
Navigate a spherical golf course by controlling orbiting trajectories to land precise shots around dynamic obstacles. Players adjust angles and force to guide the ball through rotating platforms and gravity fields, aiming for targeted holes across varied space-themed arenas. Each level challenges spatial awareness and timing with progressing complexity.  

Key Features

• Orbital shot trajectory control  
• Precision angle and power adjustment  
• Increasingly complex course layouts  
• Gravity-influenced ball physics  
• Space-themed level environments

pages.title: Fun Golf
pages.description:
Putt through imaginative courses aiming at precision and timing in this casual golf experience. Adjust shot strength and angle using intuitive controls to navigate vibrant greens filled with subtle terrain variations. Each hole tests your touch and patience as you strive to sink the ball in as few strokes as possible.

Key Features

• Precision shot control mechanics  
• Intuitive power and angle adjustment  
• Gradual difficulty curve across holes  
• Time-based scoring challenges  
• Colorful mini golf course designs

pages.title: Mini Golf Saga
pages.description:

Course design mechanics and timed challenges add layers of difficulty that cater to a casual audience including teens and kids.

pages.title: Speedy Golf
pages.description:

Players navigate compact greens focusing on rapid shot timing to clear holes efficiently, with progression through increasingly tricky, time-limited stages. This casual game blends traditional golf aiming with a unique challenge of maintaining pace under pressure.

Key Features

• Timed golf shot mechanic  
• Quick aiming and striking controls  
• Increasing difficulty with each course  
• Score-based skill progression  
• Minimalist, fast-flowing golf setting

pages.title: Infinity Golf

The gameplay mechanic revolves around carefully controlled swings to navigate challenging terrain and obstacles. Players strive to reach the hole in as few shots as possible, unlocking new levels as progression. Casual players will appreciate the accessible controls and gradually increasing difficulty.

Key Features

• Precision swing control system  
• Procedural course generation  
• Shot count scoring challenge  
• Level-based hole progression  
• Minimalistic golf-themed design
